scripts.build: pnpm --filter @canvas-engine/core-wasm build && pnpm --filter @canvas-engine/canvas build && pnpm --filter @canvas-engine/react build && pnpm --filter ./examples/basic build && pnpm --filter ./examples/collab-mock build
scripts.dev:basic: pnpm --filter @canvas-engine/core-wasm build && pnpm --filter @canvas-engine/canvas build && pnpm --filter ./examples/basic dev
scripts.dev:collab: pnpm --filter @canvas-engine/core-wasm build && pnpm --filter @canvas-engine/canvas build && pnpm --filter ./examples/collab-mock dev
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @canvas-engine/core-wasm test && pnpm --filter @canvas-engine/core-wasm build && pnpm --filter @canvas-engine/canvas test
